app.name: Welcome Car Decor
app.description: Your dealer for car exterior decor and accessories – filming, chargers, headlights, speakers and more.
app.copyright: © 2026 Welcome Car Decor. All rights reserved.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.statement: Providing quality car exterior decor and accessories – filming, chargers, headlights, speakers and more – to help you personalize and enhance your vehicle.

features.title: Delivery All Over India
features.description: We provide delivery all over India. Order from anywhere – we ship via courier to your doorstep.

features.title: Open for Collaboration
features.description: We are open for collaboration to keep your products in stock for sale. Manufacturers and distributors – reach out to discuss.

features.title: Car Services & References
features.description: We provide references for all car-related services – insurance, garages, manufacturers, and more. Ask us for trusted recommendations.

features.title: Browse by Brand
features.description: Find accessories by car brand and model. Maruti Suzuki, Hyundai, Honda, Toyota, Tata, Mahindra, Kia, MG – with real colors and models.

features.title: Categories
features.description: PPF & filming, chargers, headlights, speakers, dash cams and accessories. Real products from Aegis, Toreto, 70mai, Metaflix and more.

features.title: Quality Products
features.description: Premium car accessories from trusted brands. PPF, dash cams, LED headlights, and more – with prices and availability.

contact.address: Near Bhandari Petrol Pump, Mumbai-Pune Road, Kasarwadi, Pune-411034

testimonials.quote: Got PPF installed for my Creta. Quality work and fair pricing. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Rahul M.

testimonials.quote: Bought dash cam and car charger. Quick response and genuine products.
testimonials.author: Priya S.

home.title: Welcome Car Decor
home.tagline: Car exterior decor and accessories – filming, chargers, headlights, speakers and more.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Welcome Car Decor is your trusted dealer for car exterior decor and accessories. From filming and chargers to headlights and speakers, we help you personalize and enhance your vehicle with quality products.
